creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #2)
> There's ongoing work here: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D29274 , but right
> now dummynet cannot be used inside vnet jails.

Ah ha, thanks for the info and the link to current effort.  Is this work in any way slated for the 13.1 (or 13.2) window, or more for 14.0?
